assertions.title: Sorting changes the visible candidate ordering inside the review flow

steps.action: Open the creator-session candidate review page and record the current row order
steps.expected: Candidate review remains loaded with session context intact
steps.observed: Candidate review loaded at /sessions/session_0f58b9b85d990619224220cc with 8 visible candidate rows

steps.expected: Visible rows reorder by the selected metric while staying on the candidate-review page
steps.observed: The table remained on the same session page and rows were displayed in descending likes order after the sort action

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_0f58b9b85d990619224220cc; no POST prepare request triggered during sorting

assertions.title: Recommendation-focused filtering narrows the visible candidate set

steps.expected: All current session candidates are visible before filtering
steps.observed: Eight candidate rows were visible before enabling the filter

steps.expected: Only recommended rows remain visible or an empty state is shown for non-matches, without affecting selection controls or starting preparation
steps.observed: The filter checkbox became checked but all 8 rows remained visible because every visible row was marked `✓ Yes`

evidence.network: No prepare request triggered while toggling the recommendation filter

assertions.issues: The assigned fixture session contains only recommended rows, so the recommended-only filter does not narrow the visible set and the contract behavior could not be demonstrated.

assertions.title: Individual and bulk selection stay visible on the review surface

steps.expected: Both rows remain visibly selected and the manual selection count updates on the review page
steps.observed: The first two candidate rows remained checked and the CTA updated to `Prepare Selected (2)`

steps.expected: All visible rows become selected with a visible bulk-selection state and no preparation starts automatically
steps.observed: All 8 visible rows became checked, the header checkbox became fully checked, and the CTA updated to `Prepare Selected (8)` without triggering preparation

evidence.network: PATCH /api/sessions/session_0f58b9b85d990619224220cc/selection on selection changes; no POST prepare request triggered

steps.action: Select two candidate rows on the review page
steps.expected: The selected rows are visibly checked before any table interactions
steps.observed: `旅行Vlog | 周末短途游` and `新品开箱｜这款相机太惊艳了！` were selected and the CTA showed `Prepare Selected (2)`

steps.action: Change sort order and toggle the recommendation filter on then off
steps.expected: The same rows remain selected after sort/filter interactions while staying in the same session
steps.observed: After sorting by title and toggling the filter on and off, the same two rows remained checked and the CTA still showed `Prepare Selected (2)` on the same session page

evidence.network: PATCH /api/sessions/session_0f58b9b85d990619224220cc/selection persisted selected ids across sort/filter interactions

frictions.description: The repo-level user-testing guidance file expected by the mission instructions was not present at /Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded with contract-driven validation using the mission guidance and validation contract only.

frictions.description: The recommendation filter could not narrow the dataset because the assigned candidate fixture exposed only recommended rows.
frictions.resolution: Recorded the limitation as a failed assertion because the required narrowing behavior could not be observed from this session.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed and 1 failed. Sorting, row/bulk selection visibility, and selection persistence across sort/filter interactions worked; recommendation-only filtering did not narrow the visible candidate set in the assigned fixture session.
